gist.headline: Fresh ink in the README
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just swept through and updated the README with the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny newsboy cap, updating a wooden bulletin board with fresh polaroids of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning fresh polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny newsboy cap, pinning fresh polaroid photos to a wooden bulletin board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background.
